films.title: Sherlock Jr.
films.overview: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meager skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend's father's pocketwatch.

films.title: Our Hospitality
films.overview: A young man falls for a young woman on his trip home; unbeknownst to him, her family has vowed to kill every member of his family.

films.title: The General
films.overview: During America’s Civil War, Union spies steal engineer Johnny Gray's beloved locomotive, 'The General'—with Johnnie's lady love aboard an attached boxcar—and he single-handedly must do all in his power to both get The General back and to rescue Annabelle.

films.title: One Week
films.overview: Newlyweds receive a build-it-yourself house as a wedding gift—and the house can, supposedly, be built in "one week". A rejected suitor secretly re-numbers packing crates, and the husband struggles to assemble the house according to this new 'arrangement' of its parts.

films.title: Seven Chances
films.overview: Struggling stockbroker Jimmie Shannon learns that, if he gets married by 7 p.m. on his 27th birthday -- which is today -- he'll inherit $7 million from an eccentric relative.

films.title: The Paleface
films.overview: A butterfly collector unwittingly wanders into an Indian encampment while chasing a butterfly, but the tribe has resolved to kill the first white man who enters their encampment because white oil tycoons are trying to force them from their land.

films.title: Three Ages
films.overview: The rituals of courtship, romantic rivalry, and love play out three times as a man vies with a villain for the girl. In the Stone Age, the rivalry is set off by dinosaurs, a turtle used as a ouija board, and a round of golf with stones. In ancient Rome, the men display their brawn through a chariot race, using dogs instead of horses. In contemporary times, the man finds himself overcome by modernity, including a very fragile car.

films.title: Go West
films.overview: With little luck at keeping a job in the city a New Yorker tries work in the country and eventually finds his way leading a herd of cattle to the West Coast.

films.title: The Navigator
films.overview: The wealthy and impulsive Rollo Treadway decides to propose to his beautiful socialite neighbor, Betsy O'Brien. Although Betsy turns Rollo down, he still opts to go on the cruise that he intended as their honeymoon. When circumstances find both Rollo and Betsy on the wrong ship, they end up having adventures on the high seas.

films.title: The Blacksmith
films.overview: Buster clowns around in a blacksmith's shop until he and the smithy get in a fight which sends the smithy to jail. Buster helps several customers with horses, then destroys a Rolls Royce while fixing the car parked next to it.

films.title: Hard Luck
films.overview: A down on his luck young man makes several attempts at committing suicide but fails them too. He then finds himself becoming more confident through a series of petty adventures, to such an extent that this becomes his undoing.

films.title: My Wife's Relations
films.overview: Buster and a woman are mistakenly married and her initially unfriendly family begins to treat him nicely when they come to believe he has a large inheritance awaiting him.

films.title: The High Sign
films.overview: Buster is thrown off a train near an amusement park. There he gets a job in a shooting gallery run by the Blinking Buzzards mob. Ordered to kill a businessman, he winds up protecting the man and his daughter by outfitting their home with trick devices.

films.title: The Balloonatic
films.overview: Buster and Phyllis endure a number of outdoor adventures trying to prove to each other their survival skills. The balloon, which lands Buster in the wilderness, later proves useful as their canoe is about go over a waterfall.

films.title: Convict 13
films.overview: A young golfer is mugged by an escaped convict and finds himself in a prison where he foils a jailbreak.

films.title: Cops
films.overview: Buster Keaton gets involved in a series of misunderstandings involving a horse and cart. Eventually he infuriates every cop in the city when he accidentally interrupts a police parade.

films.title: Day Dreams
films.overview: In order to impress the father of a girl he is keen on, a young man goes to the city in search of work. In his letters home he writes of his various jobs which her imagination expands into much nobler ones than those that he is actually attempting.

films.title: The Boat
films.overview: A boat builder and his family attempt to set sail in his handmade boat, 'The Damfino'.

films.title: The Rough House
films.overview: Living under the same roof with his newly-wed wife and his mother-in-law, a careless Mr Rough sets the nuptial bedroom on fire, as the residence's cook tries to woo the maid who only has eyes for the charming delivery boy. As one thing leads to another, Mr Rough ends up preparing dinner for a pair of duplicitous guests, when, clearly, he should be staying out of the kitchen. Does Mrs Rough know the visitors' true intentions? But, above all, how will this disastrous dinner party at the Rough house end?

films.title: The Scarecrow
films.overview: Two farmhands compete for the love of the farmer's daughter.

films.title: Neighbors
films.overview: The Romeo and Juliet story played out in a tenement neighborhood with Buster and Virginia's families hating each other over the fence separating their buildings.

films.title: The Frozen North
films.overview: A mix of guns and mistaken identity leads to chaos in this satirical parody of William S. Hart's melodramatic westerns, finding Buster in the frozen north - "the last stop on the subway".

films.title: The Goat
films.overview: A series of misadventures occur when Buster is mistaken for a criminal on the lam.

films.title: The Electric House
films.overview: Botany major Buster mistakenly graduates in electrical engineering and is hired to wire a new home.

films.title: The Haunted House
films.overview: A bank teller becomes involved with a hold-up, counterfeiters and a theatrical troupe posing as spooks in a haunted house.

films.title: The Play House
films.overview: Upon waking from the dream of a theater peopled entirely by numerous Buster Keatons, a lowly stage hand causes havoc everywhere he works.

films.title: Battling Butler
films.overview: A meek millionaire masquerades as a boxing star to win a girl's heart.

films.title: The Love Nest
films.overview: In an attempt to forget his lost sweetheart, Buster takes a long trip at the sea when he's caught by pirates.

films.title: College
films.overview: A bookish college student dismissive of athletics is compelled to try out sports to win the affection of the girl he loves.

films.title: Spite Marriage
films.overview: An unimpressive but well-intentioned man is given the chance to marry a popular actress, of whom he has been a hopeless fan. But what he doesn't realize is that he is being used to make the actress' old flame jealous.

films.title: The Cameraman
films.overview: A photographer takes up newsreel shooting to impress a secretary.

films.title: Steamboat Bill, Jr.
films.overview: The just-out-of-college, effete son of a no-nonsense steamboat captain comes to visit his father whom he's not seen since he was a child.
